compiled_state.title: Tier B: Port ticket_link (LINK + cycle detection + hierarchy promotion + REDIRECT) to rebar._commands
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## What
link routes to ticket-graph.py add_dependency: relation validation (6 relations), cycle detection, blocking-link hierarchy promotion (epic<->epic etc.) emitting REDIRECT note, LINK event. Reuse rebar.graph. Promotion + REDIRECT goldens in the gate. test-ticket-link*.sh.

Port behind REBAR_LEAF_WRITES, switch-wired at dispatcher + library. Default stays bash.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] link ported to rebar._commands, switch-wired at dispatcher + library
- [ ] Command's bash suite(s) green against REBAR_LEAF_WRITES=bash AND =python
- [ ] Error strings + exit codes byte-identical
- [ ] Default remains bash

comments.body: Ported in 6344ca28: link_core/link_cli delegate to the shared rebar.graph add_dependency (same fn bash calls via ticket-graph.py) — promotion/REDIRECT/cycle/redundant all structural. --dry-run still via ticket-link.sh. Dual-run green bash AND python on link (66), discovered-from (4), duplicates-supersedes (23), python-push (2) + library parity tests. Default stays bash.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
